title: HammersAddition
description:
Hammers are the tool wich minecraft need.
Adding hammer for all  minecraft rarety and 2 new cool enchants
body: Welcome to **HammerAdditions Project** # 📖 About This mod add hammers. Hammers basically break a 3x3 area, you're also able to craft their giant and tiny version wich respectively break a 5x5 and 2x2 area. ## **Enchants**: - **Digging**: Allow pickaxes to break a 3x3 area! - **Excavator**: Allow pickaxes to break a 5x5 area! - **VeinMiner**: Allow each tool to break a group of block. It's fully configurable!!
